title: More Beautiful Walls
description: This mod adds around 240 new Walls and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Walls. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new walls you must first create the Wall Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any wall from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Wall Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Walls emit light like their respective blocks.

All Walls

Example of Wall Frame recipe

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 3 walls)

Magma Block Wall

Obsidian Cry Wall

Diamond Block Wall

Black Stained Glass Wall (All types of glass are present)

Special Walls

For some walls you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Wall, Fire Soul Wall, Lava Wall(2 version), Nether Portal Wall and Strange Wall(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
